description: Parameters for Cribl destination ID naming convention (Maxwell Labs - aws-sentinel-packv3)

notes.IDprefix: Prefix for the Cribl destination ID. Combined with table name to form IDs like 'sentinel-AWSCloudTrail'.
notes.IDsuffix: Suffix for the Cribl destination ID. Empty string keeps names concise.
notes.authentication: Azure AD authentication details (tenantId, clientId) are stored in azure-parameters.json. Client secret is set to '<replace me>' placeholder for manual configuration in Cribl Stream.
notes.pack: Destinations generated here correspond to outputs in aws-sentinel-packv3. Each DCR maps to one Cribl destination per table.
